lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: The perfectionist Candy. You have never seen her not be prepared for a situation. Be it an exam, an awkward moment or a deep conversation.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Seen is the correct word. Since you havent spoken much in the past.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: And her mentality reflects her looks. Her clothing choices and makeup scream 'Im ready for whatever bullshit youve prepared for me'.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Hey. Thanks for coming.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: So..whats up?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Youre friends with the new guy David. Correct?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Just answer the question.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I am.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: I need you to do something for me.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Get him to talk to Lisa.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: What? Why?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Dont ask question and do it.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Hold on. We barely know each other, this past year you barely looked at me in class when I said 'hi'. And now you drag me IN THE MIDDLE OF THE NIGHT over here to tell me to do something?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: First of all I didnt drag you. You came here by yourself.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: If you-

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: SECONDLY..there is something in it for you.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Thats right. So shut up and listen.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Get David to talk to Lisa and Ill go to the dance with you.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: What gave you the idea I would want to go to the dance with you?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Oh because you have so many to chose from right?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I dont even wanna go to the dance..

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Because you have nobody to go with.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Do this for me. Or even better get him to like her-

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: What am I the Cupid?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Im sure you can figure it out. Besides I can see that he likes her already.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Oh so youre the Cupid. Now I get it.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: But anyway, why do you want them to be together so bad?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Ask nicer and I might even tell you.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Fine..Lisa really likes him. And she asked me to help.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Really?!

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: *Wow finally something nice happening to David*

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: *But Jake wont be happy about me going to the dance with Candy*

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Yes, stupid. Why else would I be doing this?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Personally I dont know what she finds so interesting about a loser loner but I wanna help out my friend.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Okay hold up. If you want me to help, stop calling him that...and me!

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Jessie, I know youre gonna help just based on that reaction alone. In fact I think youre gonna do it even if I dont go to the dance with you.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: But since Boniface is out of the question now. Ill have to look for a replacement.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Great. Now im stupid AND a replacement.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Dont take it personaly...or you know what? Do.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: I could have gone with any boy in school. Ive chosen you.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Im humbled. But this feels more like a transaction than anything else.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Thats because it is. Dont get any funny ideas.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Boniface wont beat me up right?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: He knows already.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: And hes okay with it?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Yes, jessie. Dont worry about it.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Ehh, fine..Ill do it.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Sure..I thought you would be going with Boniface

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Boniface is...

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: He wont be making it to the dance.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Doesnt matter.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Are you goona do it or not?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Will Boniface beat me up for going with you?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Dont worry Ill talk to him.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Ehh, fine..Ill do it.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Then we have a deal. Tomorrow at school you do your thing and Ill acompany you to the school dance.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Do I have to wear a suit for that?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: If you come wearing something else Ill act like I dont know you.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Well at least I know where Im standing.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Sure, now you can go.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Thanks for the permission.

menu_entry.text:
Damn..Candy. is. a. bitch. But I suppose I can do this for David. Hell be happy somebody wants to spend time with him. 
Better do it with some finess though. But me going to the dance with Candy is gonna piss Jake off majorly. Maybe I just do this for David and let Candy up for grabs in case Jake grows a pair? I dont know what to do.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Oh and another thing.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah what?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: I also chose you because youre pretty handsome.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Damn. Candy giving out free compliments? What is it the opposite day?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Again I chose you for the dance for a reason. In a different universe where youre not a total dork we would be a power couple.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: But since you are, I advise you to shut your mouth at the dance so you dont embarase us both.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Aaaaand were back to cruelty. Nice. See you around.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: lisa
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: You havent been to school in so long I think I forgot your name.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Thats weird. I would think since your family owns every bank in the states that you would have a detailed summary of every family in this town.

lines.speaker: lisa
lines.text: Guys!

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Only the important ones.

lines.speaker: lisa
lines.text: Guys!!!

lines.speaker: lisa
lines.text: Can you act like normal people both of you?!

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Fine, im joking Jessie I know who you are obviously. I was just surprised you decided to come to school.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Dont be angry at me now. You just called me an oligarch even though im 15 and Im okay with it.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Fine

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Lets start over.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Hi, I havent seen you here a while? How are you doing?

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Candy says in the most pretentious way possible.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah I think I prefered the first attempt.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: See? Life is boring if I dont tease you from time to time.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Now If you excuse us, we are talking about something.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Sure, Ill see you around.

lines.speaker: lisa
lines.text: See you, Jessie.

menu_entry.text: Candy is witty Ill give her that. Shes also very rich and snobbish. A combo that suits her pretentious smile like a glove.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Jessie. We dont have time right now. Sorry.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Candy looks you dead in the eyes.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: What is it you need Jessie?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I..uhh. Its nothing really.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Yeah you look like you have nothing in your head right now.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: FINE! Im going. jesus.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Candy looks you dead in the eyes.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: What is it you need Jessie?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I..uhh. Its nothing really.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Yeah you look like you have nothing in your head right now.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: FINE! Im goin-

lines.speaker: lisa
lines.text: Candy!

lines.speaker: lisa
lines.text: Why are you like this?! You invite him to the dance and then you say this to him?!

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Fine, Im sorry jessie. What did you need?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I just wanted to say..that..youre reallyyy....pretty?

lines.speaker: lisa
lines.text: Oh, thats so sweet.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Thank you jessie. Youre a charmer for sure.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah, Ill see you around.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Candy looks you dead in the eyes.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: What is it you need Jessie?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I..uhh. Its nothing really.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Yeah you look like you have nothing in your head right now.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: FINE! Im goin-

lines.speaker: lisa
lines.text: Candy!

lines.speaker: lisa
lines.text: Why are you like this?! You invite him to the dance and then you say this to him?!

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Fine, Im sorry jessie. What did you need?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Just that the I talked to THE teacher about your problem.

lines.speaker: lisa
lines.text: What problem?

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: Thank you jessie.

lines.speaker: candy
lines.text: And its nothing Lisa. I just had a stomach problem and wanted to apologise myself to the teacher when I was missing last week.

lines.speaker: lisa
lines.text: Oh I see.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah, Ill see you around girls.

lines.speaker: lisa
lines.text: Wait Jessie..

lines.speaker: lisa
lines.text: I wanted to ask-

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Lisa, I really need some help with this exercise here. Help me real quick. And bye Jessie.

lines.speaker: lisa
lines.text: Oh, sure. Bye Jessie.
